title: aliciella stenothyrsa
intro: Aliciella stenothyrsa, also known as the "San Gabriel Mountains aliciella," is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Aliciella stenothyrsa can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant's extract with a carrier liquid, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
